version.name: 0.44-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.44-beta Change Log : Mirror: Significant performance enhancements. Mirror: New dedicated Action for independent Note text display mode. FX: Added a one-click Action to clear all Bypassed FX. UI/UX: Optimized menu item layout for better workflow.
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.27
